title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 13 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 13 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 13 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 13/12/2024
Today, iron ore fluctuated downward and finally closed at 797, with a daily decline of 1.12%. Traders shipped goods in linewith the market; steel mills reduced inquiries, and some have tender plans. The market transactions were sluggish today.
